reference: It has been three weeks since I had a colonoscopy. I am having very bad pain in my abdominal area. I have a lot of tenderness. I am kind of feeling sick. I need an answer. I live on Social Security disability. I have no money to pay you. Do you accept Medicare?
text: It has been 3 weeks since I had a colonoscopy. I am having very bad pain in my abdominal area, and I have a lot of tenderness. I am kind of feeling sick. I need an answer. I live on Social Security Disability. I have no money to pay you. Do you accept Medicare?
